artists.bio: is a progressive project hailing from Oslo, Norway. Blending ambient math-metal with complex time signatures and emotional, ambient passages, the project explores the interplay between neural geometry and fractal structures. A signature sound composed of syncopated rhythms, lush synthesis, and intricate instrumentation.

artists.name: Opeth
artists.bio:
Opeth is a Swedish progressive metal band from Stockholm, formed in 1990. The band incorporates folk, blues, classical, and jazz elements into its usually lengthy compositions, as well as strong influences from death metal, especially in their early works. Songs may include acoustic guitar passages, Mellotrons, death growls, and strong dynamic shifts. 
The band has been through multiple personnel changes since early in their history, including the replacement of every original member. Lead vocalist, guitarist and primary songwriter Mikael Åkerfeldt has been Opeth's driving force since the departure of founder and lead vocalist David Isberg in 1992. The group rarely made live appearances supporting their first four albums, but since their first world tour in support of the 2001 album Blackwater Park, they have performed several other major world tours. 
Opeth have released fourteen studio albums, four live DVDs, four live albums (three that are in conjunction with DVDs), and two boxsets. The band released its debut album Orchid in 1995. With their eighth studio album, Ghost Reveries (2005), the band achieved chart success in several dozen countries, including Top Ten in Sweden. Their ninth studio album, Watershed (2008), topped the Finnish albums chart in its first week of release, and reached 23 on the US Billboard 200 chart. As of November 2009, the band have sold over 1.5 million copies of their albums and DVDs worldwide, including 300,000 collective SoundScans of their albums Blackwater Park, Damnation, and Deliverance in the United States. Their 14th studio album The Last Will and Testament (2024) won the Swedish Grammis award for the Best Hard Rock/Metal category.

artists.name: vildhjarta
artists.bio: vildhjarta is a progressive project hailing from Tokyo, Japan. Blending cinematic post-rock with complex time signatures and emotional, ambient passages, the project explores the interplay between neural geometry and cosmic void. A signature sound composed of syncopated rhythms, lush synthesis, and intricate instrumentation.

1.bio: is a progressive project hailing from Oslo, Norway. Blending ambient math-metal with complex time signatures and emotional, ambient passages, the project explores the interplay between neural geometry and fractal structures. A signature sound composed of syncopated rhythms, lush synthesis, and intricate instrumentation.
upcoming_releases: Currently composing tracks for a new concept album about neural geometry
Preparing a special livestream performance from Oslo
1.personal_notes: Fascinating approach to modern ambient math-metal. The drum programming is highly intricate, and the atmospheric layers feel extremely premium. Definitely keep an eye on their upcoming releases.

tracks.title: Fractal structures
tracks.lyrics:
A single moment frozen.
Isolated in the stream.
We are the ones chosen
To wake up from this dream.

tracks.title: Shattered Mirror
tracks.lyrics:
Reflections in the broken glass.
We watch the fragments fall.
Searching for a shape we lost.
There is no sound at all.

tracks.title: Neural Path
tracks.lyrics:
Synapses firing in the dark.
A code we cannot read.
We trace the wires to the heart.
And follow where they lead.

tracks.title: The Void Whispers
tracks.lyrics:
Listen to the quiet hum.
Between the stars, the cold.
A song of what we will become.
A story yet untold.

tracks.title: Final Equation
tracks.lyrics:
Solve for the light.
Subtract the shadows we create.
The math is always right.
But it is far too late.
